title: staff — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — Staff + Coach CRUD by hr / owner / admin / branch_manager, self-service via .own scope suffix. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read + compensation-audit for compliance ops. All permissions carry the `staff.` or `coach.` prefix (or `platform.staff.` / `platform.coach.` on platform audience) to align with hierarchy.md §4 audience-boundary rules. Note: this module introduces the `hr` role via the RoleDefinition catalogue in the rbac module — the `hr` role gets most staff permissions but NOT `staff.hire` or `staff.suspend` by default (those stay owner/admin-only unless the tenant explicitly extends the hr role).

permissions.name: staff.view.own
permissions.description: Self-view — narrows to WHERE user_id = current_user_id. Seeded to every role so staff can see their own record.

permissions.name: staff.hire
permissions.description: Create + reactivate Staff. Consumes staff_slot; welcome notification; hire audit trail.

permissions.name: staff.hire.retroactive
permissions.description: Allows started_at more than 90 days in the past. Bureaucratic legacy import cases only.

permissions.name: staff.update.own
permissions.description: Self-update — limited fields (position self-attest not allowed; only weekly_hours self-report + notes if HR opts in via config).

permissions.name: staff.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete a Staff row. Precondition: employment_status='offboarded'.

permissions.name: staff.promote-to-manager
permissions.description: Atomic promote-and-demote route. Same permission covers both directions of the swap.

permissions.name: staff.put-on-leave
permissions.description: Transition to on_leave + back. HR + branch_manager.

permissions.name: staff.suspend
permissions.description: Disciplinary suspend + reinstate. HR + admin + owner only. Branch managers CANNOT unilaterally suspend — audit safeguard.

permissions.name: staff.offboard
permissions.description: Transition to offboarding + offboarded. HR + admin + owner.

permissions.name: staff.offboard.cascade
permissions.description: Additional permission for cascade=true — archives linked Coach + removes team memberships in one transaction.

permissions.name: staff.view.compensation
permissions.description: Read compensation_* fields on any staff row (subject to branch scope narrowing). Without this, the redactor strips compensation fields from egress.

permissions.name: staff.view.compensation.own
permissions.description: Self-view — the caller sees their own compensation fields. Every role gets this so employees can check their own pay.

permissions.name: staff.manage.compensation
permissions.description: Write compensation_* fields. Distinct from staff.update — the observer refuses writes without this even if the caller has staff.update.

permissions.name: staff.manage.compensation.large-delta
permissions.description: Bypass the max-delta-percent guard (default 50%). Rare — for approved-large-adjustment cases.

permissions.name: staff.view.emergency_contact
permissions.description: Read emergency_contact_* + tax_id_last4 fields. Without this, the redactor strips these fields.

permissions.name: staff.view.emergency_contact.own
permissions.description: Self-view.

permissions.name: staff.manage.emergency_contact
permissions.description: Write emergency_contact_* + tax_id_last4. Admin + HR.

permissions.name: staff.manage.emergency_contact.own
permissions.description: Self-manage — staff updating their own emergency contact via /me/staff/emergency-contact.

permissions.name: staff.view.direct-reports
permissions.description: See the org-chart tree rooted at a given staff. Requires staff_org_chart entitlement.

permissions.name: staff.audit.compensation
permissions.description: Compliance export — read the compensation_history audit stream for a tenant. HR-only.

permissions.name: coach.create
permissions.description: Create a Coach row (Staff assumes coaching role). Consumes coach_slot.

permissions.name: coach.update.own
permissions.description: Self-update — coach edits their own bio, avatar (via User.profile), availability, public_email, public_phone, languages.

permissions.name: coach.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete a Coach row. Precondition: status='archived'.

permissions.name: coach.pause
permissions.description: Transition status active ↔ paused. Non-disciplinary; typical use is a coach taking a coaching hiatus while remaining on staff.

permissions.name: coach.archive
permissions.description: Terminal transition — coach loses team assignments. Precondition to soft-delete.

permissions.name: coach.manage.certifications
permissions.description: Add + remove certifications from a coach's row.

permissions.name: coach.manage.certifications.own
permissions.description: Self-manage — coaches add + remove their own certifications.

permissions.name: coach.verify.certifications
permissions.description: Verify a pending certification (Enterprise-only, requires coach_certifications_verified entitlement).

permissions.name: coach.set-primary-sport
permissions.description: Change Coach.sport_key. HR + admin + owner. Coach themselves CANNOT self-reclassify.

permissions.name: coach.manage.availability
permissions.description: Edit availability_pattern on any coach.

permissions.name: coach.manage.availability.own
permissions.description: Self-manage availability.

permissions.name: platform.staff.audit-compensation
permissions.description: Support-tooling compensation audit. Emits signed CSV. Super_admin only.
